name: playwright-playground

scripts.dev: cross-env BASE_URL=https://dev.playwright.dev playwright test; npm run allure:generate
scripts.qa: cross-env BASE_URL=https://staging.playwright.dev playwright test --grep-invert "@mock"; npm run allure:generate
scripts.prod: cross-env BASE_URL=https://playwright.dev playwright test --grep-invert "@mock"; npm run allure:generate
scripts.dev-browserstack: cross-env BASE_URL=https://dev.playwright.dev browserstack-node-sdk playwright test; npm run allure:generate
scripts.qa-browserstack: cross-env BASE_URL=https://staging.playwright.dev browserstack-node-sdk playwright test --grep-invert "@mock"; npm run allure:generate
scripts.prod-browserstack: cross-env BASE_URL=https://playwright.dev browserstack-node-sdk playwright test --grep-invert "@mock"; npm run allure:generate

author: Douglas Martins Santos
description: Test in api and front web
